raw_input:
[5.0/5] Overnite cream Goes on smooth. Takes a while to soak in and is sticky before being fully absorbed. Excellent results by morning.

I like it. [1.0/5] Not enough for me This moisturizer is a light tan color and has a kind of gel texture. It smells a little medicinal and comes in a jar. I get it out with a cotton swab to try to keep it from getting germy from my fingers. My skin is dry/combo, aging, dehydrated and acne-prone. I mostly need help on my cheeks this time of year, so that's where I've been using it.

I spread this on my cheeks and it immediately leaves a slight cooling sensation. It takes a while for it to soak in/dry down completely and it feels a bit tacky until then. Once the tackiness is gone, my skin feels very soft to the touch, however, when looking in my makeup mirror, my skin doesn't look hydrated at all. It looks just like it did before using this moisturizer.

I think this might be more suited to someone younger and with oilier skin. The ingredients are nice, just not for my skin, unfortunately. [5.0/5] So smooth! I love the fact that this product is all natural and organic. As I've gotten older, my skin became more and more sensitive to certain chemicals and I always have to be vigilant when buying new products. This cream goes on so smooth and absorbs really well. I've been using this for a few weeks now and definitely feels a difference. This is great for when my skin gets super dry in the winter months, but also feel very lightweight and not greasy at all. [5.0/5] Really Like It I felt like my skin was looking kind of dull with the cica cream I was using for a while. My skin gets really dry so I was probably overdoing it with the cica.
I really like this. It takes only a little bit to cover your whole face. I do find that coming back for a second coat helps my skin not be too dry. It feels tight after it goes on but doesn’t stay that way. The predominant scent is tea tree which isn’t the best but not awful, and it dissipates quickly.
My skin does look brighter and fresher so I am happy! And I’m prone to some breakouts still at 42 but this hasn’t caused any issues there. [5.0/5] Good Yes, smoothing and moisturizing. [5.0/5] Moisturizing agents were quickly absorbed, skin felt hydrated This is a review for the Perfect Reflection Face Brightening Moisturizer-Organic-Kojic acid-Alpha-arbutin-Niacinamide-Mulberry. This moisturizer has left a fresh scent on my skin. Its moisturizing agents were absorbed quickly leaving my skin hydrated for quite some time. I do recommend it especially for oily or normal skin as it is not a greasy or a heavy moisturizer. [5.0/5] really like the moisturizer it has a consistency that I like. I think it hit to sweet spot.
it's not too watery nor too oily.
it almost looks like honey.
Once you apply it, it spreads well evenly.
It doesn't leave much behind but at the same time gives you the sense that there is a layer of protection.

I like this moisturizer a lot. [5.0/5] So far so good! I see and feel a noticeable difference with my skin after a few days. This moisturizer feels good on my face and does not feel heavy or oily. I decided to give this brand a try because it's made with organic ingredients which I think is healthier for your skin. I would recommend giving it a try! [5.0/5] Moisturizing and lightweight This cream you just need a dap because a little goes a long way. I apply it morning and night on a clean face and neck. It goes on smoothly and leaves your skin smooth when it absorbs into your face. In the evening I apply and then use my jade roller to work it into my skin. I was attracted to this cream because it was organic and I have been very pleased with the results after using it for two weeks. [4.0/5] Night Cream [[VIDEOID:bd28ddd212060fc00cc2340f84b879d1]] I like how moisturizing it leaves my face. I only use it as a night cream every two days, I’ve noticed a little brightening since I’ve been using it the past month. I would continue using it. [3.0/5] Not moisturizing once absorbed but not drying either. Haven’t noticed brightening yet This comes in a plastic bag that is sealed. Inside it is just a jar, no outer product box. But, there is plastic sealing around the jar. When you remove the lid, there is no seal there. It is made in the US. The ingredients are listed on the label.

The product itself is a creamy yellow color. It has a slight scent to it, but I can’t quite place it, but it isn’t a bad or unpleasant smell, and I only smell it if I stick my nose right up to the jar. I don’t smell it while applying it. It has a gel like texture. It glides onto the skin. It feels extremely hydrating while applying it. Like your skin is going to be really hydrated. But, once it dries down it doesn’t have that feeling, it has a slight tacky feeling that takes a few minutes to go away. It does make the skin feel smooth and slightly hydrated but not as hydrating as I’d like. But, I didn’t get this to be my main face moisturizer. I got it for its brightening effects. So far I haven’t noticed any brightening, but something like this will take time.

Right now I can say that it’s not very moisturizing. It doesn’t feel drying, but doesn’t feel moisturizing once it absorbs either. I haven’t noticed any brightening effects, but I’m going to continue using it and hopefully will notice some after continued use. It does work well under my moisturizer and makeup. Right now I only feel comfortable giving it a middle 3 stars since I can’t really speak to its effects and don’t find it moisturizing. [5.0/5] I’m happy with it I was looking for a face moisturizer I could wear that was organic. I usually do a lot of research before trying anything new, and the Perfect Reflection Face Moisturizer seems to have all the popular organic ingredients I was looking for, at a good price. I decided to give it a shot and I’m pretty happy with the results. I can already feel my skins lot smoother and less dry. [4.0/5] Organic Face Moisturizer I like that this Face Moisturizer is Natural and Organic. It is Moisturizing, anti-acne, anti-wrinkle, anti-redness, brightening. It is slightly yellow and color and has the consistency of a light serum. I can smell the Tea tree oil in the product over everything else. It has Bearberry, orange, Licorice, Tea tree, willow, papaya, sugar maple, Organic-Kojic acid, Alpha-arbutin, and Niacinamide-Mulberry.
It goes on smooth and is not oily or greasy. My skin absorbed it quickly and it did a good job of moisturizing.
It came in a sealed 2 Oz plastic jar in a bag without and box.
It is manufactured in The USA and is a good value for an all natural product. [5.0/5] Great for my skin! Earlier this year I began my skin care journey. I found a great cleaner, exfoliator , but most couldn't find a good moisturizer . Most of them would either not really moisturize my skin or cause me to break out. With this one, not only is my face softer looking I think It's starting to make look younger. The big name moisturizers use a lot of non organic chemicals. I think the ingredients used in this product has along with the quality is the reason why it's helped me out so much. I'll definitely be subscribing to this product as part of my daily skin care regiment. [5.0/5] light and hydrating bought this cream about a month ago and it came wrapped in an additional plastic bag which i appreciated for extra protection. when i initially tried the cream it felt hydrating even on my dry skin yet not overly thick or sticky. i like the light texture as heavier creams can sometimes break me out. after trying the cream for about a month i can see the difference in my skin. i appreciate the good ingredients for a reasonable price point for someone like me who is on a budget. [5.0/5] light and hydrating bought this cream about a month ago and it came wrapped in an additional plastic bag which i appreciated for extra protection. when i initially tried the cream it felt hydrating even on my dry skin yet not overly thick or sticky. i like the light texture as heavier creams can sometimes break me out. after trying the cream for about a month i can see the difference in my skin. i appreciate the good ingredients for a reasonable price point for someone like me who is on a budget. [5.0/5] light and hydrating bought this cream about a month ago and it came wrapped in an additional plastic bag which i appreciated for extra protection. when i initially tried the cream it felt hydrating even on my dry skin yet not overly thick or sticky. i like the light texture as heavier creams can sometimes break me out. after trying the cream for about a month i can see the difference in my skin. i appreciate the good ingredients for a reasonable price point for someone like me who is on a budget. [5.0/5] light and hydrating bought this cream about a month ago and it came wrapped in an additional plastic bag which i appreciated for extra protection. when i initially tried the cream it felt hydrating even on my dry skin yet not overly thick or sticky. i like the light texture as heavier creams can sometimes break me out. after trying the cream for about a month i can see the difference in my skin. i appreciate the good ingredients for a reasonable price point for someone like me who is on a budget. [5.0/5] Improve my dark spot I love it!! Before I would use the name brand cosmetics, but as I got older; I wanted to treat my body with more organic and natural ingredients. My friend’s a pharmacist and she told me to look at the active ingredients on the label versus the fluff on the label. Perfect Reflection face brightening moisturizer seemed to have the organic and natural ingredients I was looking for and the price wasn’t too bad. I used it for a few weeks and it was able to clear up some of the dark spots on my face. My skin also feels a more refreshed and has a glow about it. [5.0/5] light and hydrating bought this cream about a month ago and it came wrapped in an additional plastic bag which i appreciated for extra protection. when i initially tried the cream it felt hydrating even on my dry skin yet not overly thick or sticky. i like the light texture as heavier creams can sometimes break me out. after trying the cream for about a month i can see the difference in my skin. i appreciate the good ingredients for a reasonable price point for someone like me who is on a budget.

response:
Most buyers happy. Many give 5 stars. Few give lower.

TEXTURE AND FEEL: Cream light tan or creamy yellow, gel-like texture, honey-like consistency. Goes on smooth. Little tacky while absorbing, tackiness fades. Not greasy, not heavy. Little goes long way. Most say absorbs well and fast.

MOISTURE: Most say skin feels hydrated and soft after use. One buyer with dry/combo aging skin say not moisturizing enough, skin not look hydrated. Another say not very moisturizing once absorbed but not drying either.

BRIGHTENING: Several report brighter, fresher skin. One report dark spots cleared after few weeks. One buyer not notice brightening yet but still early.

SCENT: Tea tree smell noticeable. Some say slight medicinal smell. Scent fades quickly. Not bad.

INGREDIENTS: Many buyers praise organic natural ingredients. Contains kojic acid, alpha-arbutin, niacinamide, mulberry, bearberry, tea tree, licorice, papaya. Made in USA.

PACKAGING: Comes in 2oz plastic jar, sealed in plastic bag. No outer box.

BEST FOR: Oily, normal, combination skin. One buyer say not suited for very dry aging skin. Good for sensitive skin due to organic ingredients.

PRICE: Good value for organic product.
